title: Relay-to-JMAP bridge: MLS decrypt/encrypt
description: Wire nie-daemon's relay connection to the JMAP data store. Inbound: relay delivers opaque MLS blob → MLS decrypt → parse ClearMessage variant → store as JMAP Message (or route Payment/Profile/File events). Outbound: JMAP Message/set create → serialize ClearMessage → MLS encrypt → send via relay. This bridge is the seam between the privacy layer (relay) and the feature layer (JMAP).
